_meta.what: DEV-OWNED source of truth for the OWISMIND_DEV agent system: project key, real DSS ids, dataset names, semantic model + tool bindings, fast-lookup config, guardrails. Mirrors CAPABILITIES in OWISMIND_DEV_OWIsMind_orchestrator.py.
_meta.project_is: the DEVELOPMENT project. Build and validate everything HERE first, then promote the same change to OWISMIND_PROD_V1 (see ../OWISMIND_PROD_V1/registry.json and ../README.md) with the PROD ids.
_meta.not_runtime: NOT imported at runtime. The Code Agent files stay standalone-pasteable; CAPABILITIES is inlined in the orchestrator. Keep this file in sync by hand.

metric.note: id has historical-snapshot duplicates (an update adds a new row, old rows kept). Volume = COUNT(DISTINCT id); a ticket's current state (status, duration, close date) = its latest snapshot (max lastUpdate). Duration_ticket_total is in minutes (AVG, never SUM by default). Set via the profile overrides too (agg COUNT_DISTINCT on id).

tickets_expert.status: BEING BUILT in DEV - brain ready in repo (semantic_model/update_tickets_semantic_model.py: instructions + golden queries + descriptions + COUNT(DISTINCT id) metrics). Remaining DSS steps per PLAYBOOK: run the update script on model dM4jA4G, apply the profile overrides (COUNT_DISTINCT id, time=creationDate, Customer_id display Account_name, LD synonyms), re-dump the v1.json, then validate and promote to PROD

business_domains.note: Domains OWI cares about. A domain is 'staffed' when an enabled agent declares it; otherwise the orchestrator says honestly 'no agent for it yet'.
